## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss website updates, content strategy, and operational improvements for fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Website redesign is complete and well-received; minor tweaks and content additions needed](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Potential high-profile clients (Superhuman, Square) showing interest; positive feedback from network](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Considering a staged investment approach, starting with a SAFE round to build momentum](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Plans to develop internal content workflows and templates for efficiency and brand consistency](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)

## Topics

### Website Updates and Content Strategy

  - [New website design well-received; minor typos to be fixed](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Adding summarized work streams to FAQ section](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Transitioning to pitching directly from the website instead of slides](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Planning to create blog posts for frequently discussed topics](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Considering the addition of a programmatic "State of AI/LLM" section to the blog](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Client Acquisition and Networking

  - [Positive call with Superhuman's president; new head of marketing connection](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Potential interest from Square and other high-profile companies](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Leveraging network connections for warm introductions and credibility](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

### Investment Strategy

  - [Considering a staged SAFE round approach:](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
    1.  Initial round with best terms for early supporters
    2.  Subsequent rounds at higher valuations as social proof builds
    3.  Final round with less favorable terms due to increased demand
  - [Balancing transparency about AI capabilities with maintaining a focused external message](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)

### Operational Improvements

  - [Exploring the development of internal content creation and distribution workflows](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Considering hiring options: Lightbox for codebase development vs. in-house talent like Marcus](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Need for a good designer to create templates for social media content](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Evaluating the use of Fathom Analytics instead of Google Analytics for website tracking](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)

### Brand Assets and Design

  - [Figma files with brand guidelines and assets now accessible](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Considering using updated icons and visual elements from the new brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/sLVDi1gaFcQPckvMUHxssGhSM9J5BWLV?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
